== Notes for [[Item:Q2398|Q2398]] ==

{geni:about_me} HE KILLED A RAKSHASA NAMED DHUNDH. IT IS SAID THAT DHUNDHAR REGION AND THE DHUND RIVER ARE NAMED AFTER "DHUNDHUMARA".
<p>http://www.gloriousindia.com/history/dynasties/ikshvaku/index.html</p>
<p>http://www.gloriousindia.com/history/dynasties/ikshvaku/kuvalashva.html</p>


[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
